title: Contract C03: Story → Scene List
description: Governs the transition from Stages 3–5 (Story + Story Bible) to Stage 6 (Scene List). Defines how story sections and script lines are translated into ordered, timecoded scenes. Enforces motion direction requirement, Ma beat rules, and duration balance.

input.description: Fields from story.json and story_bible.json required before scene_list production begins.

required_from_story.purpose: Scene list is built from narration lines. Each narration line generates one or more scenes.
Scene list may not be started until template compliance is confirmed.
Section boundaries define scene group boundaries. Scene section_id must match an outline section.

required_from_project.purpose: Used to set total_duration_seconds. Total scene duration must equal duration_minutes × 60 (±5 seconds).
Frame rate must be specified before scene list. All timecodes must be valid at this FPS.

required_from_story_bible.purpose: Scene visual_description must use story_bible canonical spellings for all named entities.

output.description: What scene.json must contain when Stage 6 is complete.

required_fields.purpose: Ensures scene list covers full video duration.
Explicit flag confirming sum of scene durations equals total_duration_seconds.
A 12-minute documentary must have at least 10 distinct scenes. (Practical: expect 20–30.)

per_scene_constraints.constraint: motion_direction is required for all scenes with duration_seconds > 5
per_scene_constraints.reason: Static shots >5s without Ma beat context = amateur production. Ken Burns or pan minimum.

per_scene_constraints.constraint: is_ma_beat = true → narration_present must be false
per_scene_constraints.reason: Ma beat is pure silence. Narration breaks the contemplative function of the Ma moment.
Motion during Ma beat disrupts stillness.

per_scene_constraints.constraint: timecode_start of scene[n+1] must equal timecode_end of scene[n]
per_scene_constraints.reason: No gaps in the timeline. Scene list must be continuous from 0:00 to end.

per_scene_constraints.constraint: duration_seconds must equal timecode_end_seconds minus timecode_start_seconds
section_id must match one of outline.sections[*].section_id
per_scene_constraints.reason: Cross-reference integrity. Scene grouping maps to story structure.
All scenes must have an English visual description for AI image generation and editor communication.

ma_beat_rules.notes: Ma beat is a cultural requirement for the japan_template. Its timecode must be consistent across scene.json, voice.json, and story.json. Discrepancies are a HIGH review issue.

validation.gate: Scene List Delivery Gate (end of Stage 6)

checks.description: Sum of scene durations equals total_duration_seconds (±5 seconds)
checks.action_on_fail: Identify gap or overlap. Adjust affected scenes.
Recompute coverage. Set to true only after coverage passes.

checks.description: All scenes with duration_seconds > 5 have motion_direction set (and not 'static' unless Ma beat)
checks.action_on_fail: Flag scenes. Add motion direction for each. Review FIX-H2 applies.
Remove narration from Ma beat scene or remove Ma beat flag.

checks.description: Exactly one Ma beat scene (for japan_template niche)
checks.action_on_fail: Confirm Ma beat count with director. Zero = template violation. Two = possibly redundant.

checks.description: No timecode gaps or overlaps between consecutive scenes
checks.action_on_fail: Identify gap/overlap. Adjust timecode_end of preceding scene.

checks.description: Ma beat duration is between 10 and 60 seconds
checks.action_on_fail: Adjust Ma beat duration. Voice.json and story.json must be updated to match.

checks.description: Ma beat timecode matches voice.json [NO NARRATION] section
checks.action_on_fail: Synchronize Ma beat timecode across scene.json, voice.json, and story.md.

failure_conditions.condition: Total scene duration does not match project duration
failure_conditions.human_action: Rebalance scene durations. Common cause: intro/outro too short.
Apply FIX-H2: add motion_direction column. Assign direction to each scene >5s.
Remove narration from Ma beat scene. Move narration lines to adjacent scene.

failure_conditions.condition: Ma beat duration inconsistent across documents
failure_conditions.human_action: Apply FIX-H3: standardize Ma beat duration across scene.json, voice.json, story.json.

failure_conditions.condition: Scene spans two story sections without being split
failure_conditions.human_action: Split scene at section boundary. Review FIX-H2a applies.

recovery_strategy.scenario: Duration gap at end of scene list
recovery_strategy.strategy: Add the gap seconds to the final scene (OUTRO) duration. If OUTRO is already full, split OUTRO into OUTRO + END_CARD scene.
Identify scenes where estimated duration is padded. Trim 1–3 seconds from lower-priority B-roll scenes. Do not trim Ma beat or hook scene.

For each static scene >5s: assign default motion based on content type. Landscape/exterior → slow_pan_right or slow_pan_left. Architecture detail → slow_zoom_in. Ruin/decay → ken_burns. Title card → static (exception applies).

recovery_strategy.scenario: Ma beat timecode mismatch across documents
recovery_strategy.strategy: Treat scene.json as authoritative for Ma beat duration. Update voice.json [NO NARRATION] duration. Update story.md section timing note. Do not change Ma beat scene ID.

visual_description.text_en: Empty concrete corridors of Hashima apartment block. Amber late-afternoon light. Dust particles visible.

invalid_scene.violation: C03-V03: duration > 5s but motion_direction is null. Must be set.
